finding_results.notes: Kept the opening on Floor 2, anchored Priya to the relay-room pod, and replaced the impossible server-room adjacency with the east stairwell so the scene geography now matches the continuity sheet.

The broken shelving now tears Noor open below the right ribs during the first grapple, Noor registers the hit immediately, and the later bleed-out passages consistently refer back to that established wound.
Rephrased both Ember outputs so they stay polished, corporate, and context-indifferent without reusing the banned calibration phrases.
Checked the revised chapter against all style-bible example lines. No example line shares more than four consecutive words with the current chapter text.

Removed the chapter's repeated 'same register' inventories. Chapter 17 now carries the ending pressure through the message itself and the final 'It will still be helpful' beat instead of repeated explanatory gloss.

Eliminated Chapter 17's local instances of the 'same register it used on/when' construction, but the packet's acceptance test is cross-chapter and the remaining occurrences in Chapters 14-16 were out of scope for this pass.

Removed the Chapter 17 version of the 'same soft ping' plus 'routine work' reflection. The manuscript-wide threshold still depends on earlier chapters that were not available for revision in this pass.
Varied the lighting language across the chapter. The revised file contains zero uses of 'fluorescent' or its inflections.
Converted the chapter's descriptive and expository em-dashes into full clauses or sentence breaks. The revised file contains zero em-dash lines.
Revaried sentence openings across action, description, and aftermath. The revised chapter has 14 'She' sentence-openers, down below the packet target of 20.

finding_results.notes: Recast the remaining clipped countdown and scene-inventory beats into fully grammatical sentences while preserving compression and pressure. The other cited beats in the live chapter already read as syntactically complete and were left intact.

pass_summaries.summary: Fixed the chapter-local structural and craft blockers in Chapter 17, including the Floor 2 geography, the on-page source of Noor's fatal wound, copied Ember calibration language, and the chapter-level repetition/density issues. Two recurrence findings remain PARTIAL because their acceptance tests are manuscript-wide and the revision scope for this pass was limited to chapter_17.md.
Resolved the prose fragment drift finding by removing the remaining stand-alone emphatic fragments and preserving the chapter's existing rhythm through complete sentences.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=9, PARTIAL=2, UNRESOLVED=0).
